steps.title: Apply the triangle inequality
steps.content: With sides 10 and 12, the third side $x$ must satisfy $x < 10+12=22$ and $x > |10-12|=2$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice C, $2 < x < 22$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
